items.name: kitty shades!!
items.description:
introducing the purr-fect fashion accessory for all the trendsetters out there - the kitty shades! get ready to make a bold style statement with these limited edition UGC shades that combine cuteness and coolness in one irresistible package.

designed with an enchanting pastel pink color, accented by a delicate white outline, these shades are sure to turn heads wherever you go. but that's not all! adorning the front of these fabulous frames are mesmerizing glowing hearts that radiate warmth and affection. it's like wearing love on your face!

but wait, there's more! as if the hearts weren't enough to melt hearts, the kitty shades also feature a delightful glowing kitty paw, adding a touch of whimsy and charm. it's as if a playful feline companion is always by your side, brightening up your day with its adorable presence!

join lucids UGC for more upcoming adorable items! - https://www.roblox.com/groups/32642659/lucids-UGC#!/about
